name: RABBIT-CAGE-3
title: registry.json lists 14 features but 17 feature.json dirs exist on disk — breeder, vet, subagent-policy-injection are orphaned
description: Three directories under .claude/features/ contain feature.json files but are not listed in registry.json: breeder/, vet/, subagent-policy-injection/. Running rebuild-registry.sh would re-include them. These are intended-to-be-archived features. Additionally, root-management is in the registry but is an intermediate product to delete. registry.json is the source of truth for dispatch-feature-edit.sh and other tools — drift causes silent failures.
